title: Travelers Backpack: Dehydration Upgrade
description: Adding Dehydration mod support for Traveler's Backpack with 2 new upgrades
body:
This Fabric mod adds two new upgrade for Traveler's Backpack to interact with Dehydration mod

REQUIRE TRAVELER'S BACKPACK AND DEHYDRATION MOD

- Flask Upgrade: This upgrade allow you to fill your water flask on the fly using water or purified water from the backpack tank (Tank Upgrade Required)
- Drinking Upgrade:  Automatic drinking water from any flask you have in backpack, with filter option to only drink purified water or drink everything
  
**Config file name is dehyflaskupgrade with supported config for water cost for filling flask, delay between auto drink attemps, etc...**

![Traveler Backpack UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75a278934df70b8fd415ab072b62a5806538e0d.png)
